description.ko: 플로라-9은 디지털 자연의 정점을 상징합니다. 식물 본연의 아름다움과 고속 데이터 구조가 결합된 합성 유기체로, 가상 황야의 중심에서 피어납니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents the pinnacle of digital nature, a synthetic organism where botanical beauty meets high-speed data architecture, blooming in the heart of the virtual wilderness.

prompt: Hyper-realistic close-up of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic flower with translucent glass-like petals containing glowing neon fiber-optic veins, floating in a void of digital particles and liquid data, bioluminescent pollen suspended in mid-air, soft blue and violet ambient lighting, 8k resolution, cinematic composition, techno-organic aesthetic.
